name_en: Chane1🧩24B Autumn/Winter Series AS4947 Pearl Style, full of atmosphere. Lambskin with gold metal, truly loveable. The combination of black's stability and gold's luxury brings a unique charm. The small gold double-C clasp and pearl chain design make this bag even more unique. The luxury feel is not lost at all. This small flap bag is convenient to carry and still has capacity. Super easy to carry for daily use.

Size: 12×20×6cm
